creator: jaap@NLnetLabs.nl
text:
(In reply to daniel.engberg.lists from comment #1)

Note it has always been using PORTVERSION as far as I know. This seems to be standard for (dns) ports. A quick scan shows 248 times PORTVERSION against 69 times for DISTVERSION.

It if ftp.rhnet.is stopped working, it is fine with me.

The LIB_DEPENDS += was on request since 2014 (See bug #186693).

I would prefer to keep the CONFLICTS line. There is no direct need to remove it, and I don't want to speculate how many people are still running old cruft.
